final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand-ready logo for a cultural-experiential Israeli project.

Style/medium:
  Custom logo wordmark design
  Modern, innovative, friendly and experiential
  Feels specially designed — not a generic font

Composition:
  Based on the attached logo as the exact base
  Keep the same overall logo concept
  Keep the two tilted capsule/ticket shapes
  Keep the playful dynamic composition

Subject:
  Logo with custom Hebrew wordmark "קפסולת הזמן"
  The Hebrew lettering must feel unique, brand-specific, rounded, bold, playful but controlled, modern, and highly memorable
  Give distinctive personality to letters: ק, פ, ס, ת, ז, מ, ן
  Typography stays friendly and approachable but feels iconic and branded

Scene/backdrop:

Lighting/mood: Friendly, approachable, experiential

Color palette: Keep the main color idea from the original logo

Materials/textures:

Text (verbatim): קפסולת הזמן

Constraints:
  Use the attached image as the exact base reference
  Preserve the two tilted capsule/ticket shapes
  Preserve the overall composition and friendly feeling
  Lettering must feel custom-designed for this project, not a generic rounded Hebrew font

Avoid:
  Childish cartoon style
  Generic bubble font
  Handwritten look
  Ornamental tricks or overly decorative details
  Any font that looks off-the-shelf
